name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY)
benefit: Cashless tertiary healthcare cover for eligible low-income families in Maharashtra.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) - Maharashtra
benefit: Cashless hospitalization cover through empanelled hospitals for eligible beneficiaries.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
benefit: Direct income support transferred in installments to eligible farmer families.

name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana
benefit: Additional Maharashtra state income support for PM-KISAN beneficiary farmers.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
benefit: Crop insurance support against yield losses due to natural calamities.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Access to timely and affordable credit for crop and allied farming activities.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Soil nutrient testing and recommendations to improve farm productivity.

name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
benefit: Digital agri-market access for better price discovery and transparent trade.

name: Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana
benefit: Support for reliable daytime farm electricity through solarized feeders.
source: Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Ltd.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
benefit: Guaranteed wage employment opportunities for rural households.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
benefit: Financial support for construction of pucca houses in rural areas.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U) Maharashtra
benefit: Housing subsidy and affordable home support for urban beneficiaries.
source: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
benefit: Working capital loan support for street vendors with digital incentives.
source: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (MUDRA)
benefit: Collateral-free business loans for micro and small enterprises.

name: Stand Up India Scheme
benefit: Bank loan support for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to start enterprises.

name: Chief Minister Employment Generation Programme (CMEGP)
benefit: Subsidy-linked support to establish micro enterprises in Maharashtra.

name: Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
benefit: Credit-linked subsidy for setting up new micro-enterprises.

name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM)
benefit: Livelihood, self-employment and skill support for urban poor households.
source: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
benefit: Short-term skill training with certification and placement support.
source: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
benefit: Apprenticeship opportunities with stipend support and industry exposure.
source: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

name: Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Scholarship
benefit: Scholarship support for higher education students from Maharashtra.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students - Maharashtra
benefit: Tuition and maintenance assistance for eligible SC students.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students - Maharashtra
benefit: Financial assistance for OBC students in post-matric education.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for VJNT Students - Maharashtra
benefit: Post-matric scholarship support for VJNT category students.

name: Tuition Fees and Examination Fees for OBC Students
benefit: Fee reimbursement assistance for eligible OBC students.

name: EBC Tuition Fee Waiver Scheme - Maharashtra
benefit: Tuition fee concession for economically backward students.

name: Dr. Panjabrao Deshmukh Hostel Maintenance Allowance
benefit: Hostel and maintenance allowance support for eligible students.

name: Savitribai Phule Scholarship for Girls
benefit: Scholarship support to promote girls' education continuity.

name: Minority Pre-Matric Scholarship
benefit: Scholarship aid for school students from notified minority communities.

name: Minority Post-Matric Scholarship
benefit: Scholarship support for minority students in higher classes and colleges.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
benefit: Financial support for girl students pursuing technical education.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
benefit: Scholarship support for specially-abled students in technical courses.

name: Majhi Kanya Bhagyashree Yojana
benefit: Financial encouragement and security support for families with girl children.

name: Lek Ladki Yojana
benefit: Stage-based financial assistance for girl children from eligible families.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
benefit: Maternity benefit support for eligible pregnant and lactating women.
source: Ministry of Women and Child Development

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefit: Long-term savings scheme for the education and future of girl child.

name: Shravan Bal Seva State Pension Scheme
benefit: Monthly pension assistance for eligible senior citizens in Maharashtra.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
benefit: Social pension support for elderly persons from low-income households.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
benefit: Contributory pension scheme for organized and unorganized workers.

name: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
benefit: Assistive devices and support for BPL senior citizens with age-related disabilities.
